positive: A minimalist, stylized silhouette of a forest cabin nestled in a vibrant, ethereal forest at sunrise. The cabin features sharp geometric lines and a cozy, warm glow emanating from its windows. Surrounding the cabin, oversized, stylized flora—such as ferns, mushrooms, and geometric trees—create a strong, symmetrical composition. Use a flat, vector illustration style with limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo blues, burnt orange, and moss green. The overall mood is whimsical and tranquil. Central composition, isolated on a clean background. Perfect for direct apparel printing. --ar 1:1 --style raw
